{{CargoRelic
|name=Cat and Red Fish
|class_id=21650
|rank=AAA
|affct=ART
|source=
|description=Matisse’s chromatic duel. Sunlit feline vs. vermilion swimmers in a cobalt battlefield.
|fame=32
|art=73
|fth=48
|civ=52
|tech=38
|ss1=Snail ATK +30<br>Per 5 ART Relics awakened, Snail DEF +9<br>ART Relics Awakened: 100/100
|ss2=Snail ATK +40<br>Per 5 ART Relics awakened, Snail DEF +12<br>ART Relics Awakened: 100/100
|ss3=Snail ATK +50<br>Per 5 ART Relics awakened, Snail DEF +15<br>ART Relics Awakened: 100/100
|ss4=Snail ATK +70<br>Per 5 ART Relics awakened, Snail DEF +21<br>ART Relics Awakened: 100/100
|ss5=Snail ATK +90<br>Per 5 ART Relics awakened, Snail DEF +27<br>ART Relics Awakened: 100/100
|ss7=Snail ATK +90<br>Per 5 ART Relics awakened, Snail DEF +27<br>ART Relics Awakened: 100/100<br>Snail ATK +70 (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Forestsanctum skill II.png|50px]]Place in Forest Sanctum: Forest Sanctum, Glorium Cap +15%
|skill2=[[File:Forestsanctum skill II.png|50px]]Place in Forest Sanctum: This Relic's ART +10
}}
